title: Invalid VDBE program built if ORDER BY used
key_bug_features: Invalid VDBE program with ORDER BY clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, value REAL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('Bob', NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table ORDER BY value DESC;
SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at ASC;
